spec.name: compute_crc32
spec.description: Computes the CRC-32 checksum of a file on disk and returns the unsigned integer.

path.description: The absolute path to the file.

spec.implementation_notes: Use Python's zlib.crc32 on the binary content of the file.

request.rationale: The existing file reading tools are truncating the content of app.log, making it impossible to calculate an accurate CRC-32 checksum locally. A dedicated tool that computes the checksum directly from the file on disk avoids memory/buffer limits.
